Sim-Lab / EV Home Charging Cost
EV Charging · Calculator

EV Home Charging Cost Calculator

Most drivers overestimate what it costs to charge at home. Enter your battery size, your electricity rate, and your monthly miles to see your real cost per full charge, your monthly charging bill, and your cost per mile — updated instantly.

Share this
Calculator

EV Home Charging Cost

Estimate what a full charge and your monthly charging costs at home.

$— Full charge (0→100%)
$— Est. monthly cost
—¢ Cost per mile

Estimates only, based on the numbers you enter. Actual utility rates, fees, and charging losses vary.

How to read your results

  • Cost per full charge = usable battery (kWh) × your rate (¢/kWh), adjusted for charging losses.
  • Cost per mile lets you compare directly against gasoline — home charging is typically 3–5¢ per mile.
  • Time-of-use rates (charging overnight) can cut your monthly cost sharply. Check your utility's off-peak window.

Estimates only — actual costs vary with your utility tariff, charging losses, temperature, and driving. Verify with your electricity bill.
